notes.en: [[character:lohen]] is a [[element:cryo]] DPS who deals the majority of his damage through [[ability:na]]s and [[ability:ca]]s, but weaves [[ability:skill]] and [[ability:burst]] damage throughout. [[character:lohen]]'s damage is further increased when Off-Field DPS units deal large amounts of damage.
notes.fr: [[character:lohen]] est un DPS [[element:cryo]] qui inflige la majorité de ses dégâts avec ses [[ability:na]]s et [[ability:ca]]s, tout en intégrant des dégâts de [[ability:skill]] et de [[ability:burst]] tout au long de sa rotation. Les dégâts de [[character:lohen]] augmentent davantage lorsque des personnages DPS off-field infligent de grandes quantités de dégâts.
notes.it: [[character:lohen]] è un DPS [[element:cryo]] che infligge la maggior parte dei suoi danni tramite [[ability:na|Attacchi Normali]] e [[ability:ca|Caricati]], integrando però anche danni da [[ability:skill]] e da [[ability:burst]]. I **danni inflitti da [[character:lohen]] aumentano ulteriormente quando sono presenti DPS fuori campo che infliggono danni ingenti**.

notes.en: Rankings assume [[character:lohen]] is **not** run in a team where he himself triggers [[element:melt]] reactions.
notes.fr: Les classements supposent que [[character:lohen]] n'est **pas** joué dans une équipe où il déclenche lui-même des réactions de [[element:melt]].
notes.it: Le classifiche partono dal presupposto che [[character:lohen]] **non** sia giocato in un team dove lui stesso provoca reazioni di [[element:melt]].
